form.formComment: Resumes off a 36 day letup. Last run raced on the pace prior to fading finished sixth of 18 starters at Sandown Park on March 7 over 3980m, on slow going 17 len behind Scorpio Rising with 73.5kg at $7.50. Run before won by 8 len Market Rasen on February 1 over 4100m defeating Gee Force Flyer with 71kg at $2.50 in a hurdle. Cannot be ruled out - worth another chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months. Finished off last campaign 3 in a small field at this track November 19 over 3200m, slow track; 12 len behind There Runs Mary carrying 69.5kg at $26. Previously first up; 7 of 12 starters at Wolverhampton May 19 over 3320m, 10 len behind Queensland Boy carrying 61kg at $34. Capable of playing a major role.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At big odds at debut, finished fifth of 8 starters at Taunton on February 3 over 3800m, in the wet; 66 len behind Talk To The Man carrying 71kg at $6.50. Second-up ran last at Hereford on February 22 over 3900m, on slow going 55 len behind Glancing Jack with 71.5kg at $34. Needs to do more. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after two months finished seventh of 10 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on March 21 over 3900m, 47 len behind Tommy Pickles carrying 73kg at $21. Previously second-up finished second of 12 runners at Turtulla P2p on January 11 over 4828m, on slow going 5 len behind Game Theatre with 61kg. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up pulled up at Exeter on March 6 over 3300m. Second run from a spell finished sixth of 12 starters at Wincanton on March 23 over 3000m, 26 len behind Stanners Glen with 72.5kg at $251. Likely to find this too tough without big improvement.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 14 months break. Finished off last preparation 5 of 8 starters at Kempton Park February 7 2025 over 3200m, slow track; 9 len behind Frontier Prince with 73kg at $5.50. First ever start ran 5 of 13 starters at Southwell December 16 2024 over 3180m, 5 len behind In The Age carrying 71kg at $6.50. Expecting a bright return.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last preparation finished eighth of 16 starters at Huntingdon on January 22 over 3200m, on slow going 41 len behind Double Measure carrying 72kg at $401. First up last campaign finished fourth in a small field at Bellharbour P2p on February 2 2025 over 4828m, 5.5 len behind Bud Fox carrying 60kg. Others are preferred.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming finished third of 12 starters at Newbury on February 17 over 3270m, slow track; 4 len behind Lancelot Allen with 73.5kg at $126. Second-up finished third of 14 starters at Exeter on March 17 over 3300m, 5 len behind Constellation Walk with 72.5kg at $8. Continues to improve. Ready to bounce back to winning form.
